dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THIS EPISODE CONTAINS DEPICTIONS OF VIOLENCE THAT MAY BE UPSETTING FOR SOME READERS.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Now this is fascinating.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What in the world happened in here?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I was only gone for a minute, but look at all this mess!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [MAIN SCENARIO #1 PROVE YOUR VALUE HAS ENDED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NUMBER OF SURVIVORS IN CABIN NUMBER 3807 OF TRAIN NUMBER 3434 TO BULGWANG: 5

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: SURVIVORS: HYEONSEONG LEE, SANGAH YU, GILYEONG LEE, DOKJA KIM. (KIM NAMWOON and MYEONGOH HAN are not listed as survivors by the system, likely dead or not counted.)

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: H-Help me! Please help me! I'm begging you!

dialogue.speaker: KIM NAMWOON
dialogue.line: Why should I?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: People's lives are important! So it is only right that you, Kim Namwoon, save me? That's how things were in the old world. You said so yourself. A new world needs new rules.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: N-No! I don't want to die! Please! Help me! Argh!

dialogue.speaker: KIM NAMWOON
dialogue.line: You were right. I am just like you.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: I could've saved those people.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: I'd be lying if I said I didn't feel guilty. But it is strange... How am I able to remain so calm? It feels like I'm watching the novel instead of actually partaking in it.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU SLAUGHTERED 124 LIVING ORGANISMS:] SLAUGHTER DETAILS: 4 GRASSHOPPER, 123 GRASSHOPPER EGGS

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Oh, huh? I'm clean.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [DUE TO KILLING NON-RESISTANT ORGANISMS, THE NUMBER OF COINS YOU OBTAINED HAS BEEN HALVED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE OBTAINED 6,200 COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [THE COINS YOU USED TO LEVEL UP YOUR STATS WILL BE DEDUCTED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE OBTAINED 3,500 COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE UNLOCKED THE ACHIEVEMENT 'DECIMATOR' DUE TO EXCESSIVE SLAUGHTERING]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE OBTAINED 300 COINS AS A BASIC CLEAR REWARD]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [100 COINS HAVE BEEN DEDUCTED FOR THE 'VULIY' CHANNEL USAGE FEE]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [ADDITIONAL REWARDS WILL BE CALCULATED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world we once knew has collapsed, and a new world is being born.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh, it is moving! We can go home now!

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: And I am...?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: W-What in the world...? My God...

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Now this is fascinating.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: ...the only reader who knows... how this world will end.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: ?!! Why are we stopping again? Ahhh! It is coming for us!

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Oh, it isn't... That snake-like monster is called an Ichthyosaur. It is also known as a Sea Serpent. Later on, it will be classified as a Grade 7 monster in TWSA.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: W-What on earth is that?

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: The world of TWSA prioritizes scenarios over everything. So we won't be attacked by any creatures unless they are part of the scenario. We're safe... for now.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: One, two, three... twenty, twenty-one. There are 21 in total.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: No wonder he is so happy.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: The number of stars signifies the number of Constellations that are logged into the channel.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Constellations. They are the most mysterious beings in TWSA and the masterminds behind this tragedy who livestream the scenarios from across the universe. In other words, they are the ones who watch the Dokkaebis' channels.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: This channel had 21 viewers, which is a lot for a newbie Dokkaebi.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: He's just crying of happiness.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: In the original story, Namwoon Kim killed almost everyone in this cabin.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [DUE TO THE DEATH OF NAMWOON KIM, TWO CONSTELLATIONS FEEL SLIGHT HOSTILITY TOWARDS YOU]

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Some constellation must be furious about the outcome. And this error probably happened because I killed Namwoon Kim.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [DUE TO AN UNEXPECTED INSPECTION, SCENARIO PAYMENT IS BEING DELAYED. PLEASE WAIT A MOMENT]

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Judging from how the Constellations' preferences are popping up, I guess this is officially the beginning of the story.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: It is just unbelievable... I was in their position yesterday... But now they are the ones watching me.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [A FEW CONSTELLATIONS ARE IMPRESSED WITH YOUR SCENARIO]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [THE CONSTELLATIONS HAVE GIFTED YOU 500 COINS]

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Of course, if there are Constellations who hate me, there are also Constellations who support me.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: I hope all of you enjoy the show. Because sooner or later, you'll end up paying the admission fee with your lives.

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH YU
dialogue.line: Dokja? Are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Sangah. I'm sorry. I couldn't save the old lady.

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH YU
dialogue.line: Dokja, how are you so...?

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Pardon?

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH YU
dialogue.line: It's nothing. Thanks for earlier.

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH YU
dialogue.line: You aren't the cause of this towards me...

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Oh, that's just a coincidence. It won't happen again.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: I don't know what she is thinking, but she was smart enough to survive this chaos.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: She probably understood what I said. Because of my choice, some lived while some died.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: I don't deserve the gratitude of those who survived.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Wow! So, did you all prove your worth? I see there are many survivors.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Oh my! Thank you for the sponsorship, dear Constellations! I can't believe there are 21 Constellations watching my channel!

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: There are five survivors. That is more than I thought there would be.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: I expected Hyeonseong Lee to survive since he's strong and athletic.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Gilyeong Lee. That must be his name.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Hey, kid.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Do you want to live? If I had to use a word to describe this... then let's team up.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: No... it would be hypocrisy.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [A FEW CONSTELLATIONS ARE IMPRESSED WITH YOUR GOOD DEED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [THE CONSTELLATIONS HAVE GIFTED YOU 200 COINS]

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Even though it seems shameless, it can't be helped... Because I, too, want to live.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Considering the events that will follow, I have to get the attention of the Constellations.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: A lot of interesting things happened today.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: The guy in the next cabin was also a total nutcase.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Then are you going to let us go now?

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: And lastly... Mr. Myeongoh Han. He is one lucky guy.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: We did everything you asked for.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Hmm... Let you go? Haven't you seen what is going on outside? Are you sure you want me to let you go?

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Anyways, I'm impressed. I didn't have any expectations for this cabin, but you all survived the first scenario.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Uh...

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: You have proven that even bugs deserve to survive.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Damn it. We're nothing but grasshoppers to him.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Of course, every hardship deserves a reward. The reward for the first scenario is that you are now qualified to be sponsored by Constellations. Exciting, right?

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: What's this? None of you seem excited at all. This is a pretty big deal, you know.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA KIM
dialogue.line: Of course they don't know. I'm the only person who knows what a Constellation or sponsor is. Let me break it down for you.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: All of you are terribly so weak right now.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: If you were to just move onto the next scenario in this state, you would be killed by a weak ground rat, let alone a Kruk.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: But there are great beings in this world who pity you and wish to sponsor you.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Do you understand?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What is that supposed to mean? Who's sponsoring who?

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Gosh, you really are hopeless. There's no point in explaining it all over again. Why don't you just experience it yourselves?

summary: Dokja Kim reflects on his actions after the first scenario, where he killed Kim Namwoon and many 'non-resistant organisms,' feeling guilty yet calm. He observes the Dokkaebi explaining the concept of Constellations and sponsorships to the remaining survivors, including Sangah Yu, Hyeonseong Lee, and Gilyeong Lee, as a new monster, an Ichthyosaur, appears. Dokja realizes he must gain the Constellations' attention to survive.
